name: entry-quality
description: P6.7 canonical entry-quality decomposition: regresses OOS trade R (RMultiple) on observable-at-entry features (ATR percentile, EMA distance in ATR, squeeze age, session). Not for prediction — for diagnosis: reveals WHICH conditions your entries pay in, feeding filter design by evidence. Run after any backtest that produced ≥10 trades to see what drives entry quality.
